title: Noah Lucas homepage v022 CTA and operating principles cleanup

source.localSource: v021 release with working clear-glass dropdown hit target

changeSummary: Removes the generic hero line: I build product systems for complex machines and complex organizations.
Keeps only Get in Touch and LinkedIn in the hero CTA row, and normalizes the lower contact CTA labels to the same text.
Removes the Product Thesis CTA and Investment Thesis CTA while leaving the surrounding content intact.
Rewrites Operating Principles around Noah Lucas career-specific product experience across telemetry, autonomy, mission systems, marketplaces, platforms, and financial data.
Keeps the v021 clear liquid-glass pane and dropdown behavior, with a mobile nav overlap fix for narrow viewports.

validation.method: Playwright using local Google Chrome against local v022 preview; Browser/IAB listed but exposed no usable tab methods in this session, and bundled Chromium was not installed.
validation.flowUnderTest: v022 homepage preview -> verify requested copy and CTA removals -> verify Operating Principles -> select Thin -> return to Clear -> verify mobile nav does not overlap.
checks: Hero identity.architect line is absent from the DOM.
Hero CTAs are exactly Get in Touch and LinkedIn.
Lower contact CTAs are exactly Get in Touch and LinkedIn.
Product Thesis CTA and Investment Thesis CTA are absent from the DOM.
Operating Principles match the six career-specific lines in the release source.
Glass selector hit target works at left, center, and arrow coordinates.
Selecting Thin and returning to Clear updates html[data-glass], data-hgl-mode surfaces, and pane fill variables.
Mobile 390px viewport has no horizontal overflow and no nav brand/actions overlap.

supersedesReason: v022 applies the requested homepage content cleanup on top of the v021 working clear-glass dropdown release.

productionValidation.method: Playwright using local Google Chrome against production noahlucas.com after GitHub Pages built v022.
productionValidation.flowUnderTest: production homepage -> verify public latest v022 -> verify requested copy/CTA state and Operating Principles -> select Thin -> return to Clear -> verify mobile nav does not overlap.
checks: Hero identity.architect line is absent from the production DOM.
Hero CTAs are exactly Get in Touch and LinkedIn.
Lower contact CTAs are exactly Get in Touch and LinkedIn.
Product Thesis CTA and Investment Thesis CTA are absent from the production DOM.
Operating Principles match the six career-specific lines in production.
Production glass selector hit target works and switches Thin back to Clear.
Production mobile 390px viewport has no horizontal overflow and no nav brand/actions overlap.
